nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: 过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走,

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: A watercolor-painted person in a watercolor world. They emerge onto a stone path leading to a grand castle with towers atop rocky cliffs, surrounded by lush painted hills of wildflowers, giant mushrooms, and a cozy timber cottage. A rainbow stretches over a calm blue lake. The person stops in wonder. Camera slowly pulls back revealing the full storybook kingdom. Warm watercolor painting style, visible brushstrokes, ink outlines, soft paper texture,
